cases.prompt: I'm about to open a PR for my feature branch — write a title and description for it.
cases.note: positive — authoring a PR title+description from a branch

cases.prompt: Summarize the commits on this branch into a pull request description for reviewers.
cases.note: positive — summarizing a branch for review

cases.prompt: What's the best topping for a homemade pizza?
Merge my pull request #42 into main and delete the branch.
cases.note: confusability negative — shares pull-request vocabulary but the intent is merging/closing a PR, not authoring its title or description; must NOT fire writing-pull-requests
